scripts.test: npm --workspace packages/engine run test && npm --workspace packages/web run test && npm --workspace packages/server run test
scripts.lint: npm --workspace packages/engine run lint && npm --workspace packages/web run lint && npm --workspace packages/server run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace packages/engine run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/web run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/server run typecheck
scripts.build: npm --workspace packages/engine run build && npm --workspace packages/web run build && npm --workspace packages/server run build
